caption:
Men's looks of the week!

When did dressing well become so complicated — and who decided it had to be? There is something quietly radical about a wardrobe built on texture, proportion and ease. These looks move the way island mornings do: unhurried, considered, full of small details that reward a closer look. From the sculptural wooden pendants to the washed linen sets, this is dressing as a kind of philosophy. Swipe through and let the pieces speak.

Hat: @kangol
Trousers: @la_haine_inside_us
Jersey: @lurdesbergada_syngmancucala
Jewellery: @tormentina_project
Linen outfit: @nousaconcept
